name: Anise Cookies #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and sugar until fluffy cream is formed.
2. Gradually add flour and ground anise to the egg mixture.
3. Using 2 teaspoons, place small heaps of the dough on a baking sheet.
4. Allow the baked cookies to dry overnight.
5. The next morning, preheat your oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
6. Bake the cookies for 8-10 minutes, or until they maintain their pale color.
